item.title: Consolidate duplicate item filtering logic between pick_item() and list_pickable_ids()
item.intent: Eliminate the 95% overlapping jq filters in pick_item() and list_pickable_ids() by extracting a shared pickable-items jq filter or helper function
steps: Compare the jq filters in pick_item() and list_pickable_ids() to identify exact overlap
Extract a shared jq filter variable or helper function for pickable item selection
Refactor both functions to use the shared filter
Verify item picking still works correctly with dependencies and priority ordering
acceptanceCriteria: The core filtering logic (ready, intent, dependencies, skip list) exists in exactly one place
Both pick_item and list_pickable_ids produce identical results to before
